product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I'm really interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have listed. It looks like a fantastic set! I was wondering if there's any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: It's an excellent choice, truly one of the best TVs available! We've priced the LG C3 65-inch very competitively at $1,799, reflecting its premium features and performance. What price were you hoping to achieve?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I'm very interested in the C3, it's an excellent TV. I was hoping for a price closer to $1399.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your interest in such a high-performing TV. The LG C3 65-inch is truly exceptional with its OLED evo panel and gaming features. While $1399 is a bit lower than we can go for this premium model, I could offer it to you today for **$1,599**. That's a great price for a TV of this caliber.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but $1599 is still a bit outside my budget for this purchase. I was really hoping to stay closer to $1399. Is there any flexibility closer to that range?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand you're looking for the best possible deal. The LG C3 is a top-tier TV, and we're already offering it at a very competitive price. Given its features, like the OLED evo panel and advanced gaming capabilities, the absolute best I can do for you on this premium model is **$1,499**.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you trying to work with me. However, $1499 is still beyond what I can afford for this purchase. I cannot go above my budget.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget is firm. To help you secure this incredible TV, I can make an exception and offer the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV to you for **$1,399**. This is the absolute best I can do and is a fantastic deal for a TV of this caliber.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That's a fantastic offer! I'm happy to accept $1,399 for the LG C3.
